per_outcome.operationalization: DOT scale 0-10 measuring Direction, Control, and Planning (DCP) requirements of occupations
DOT GED-MATH scale 0-10 measuring quantitative skill requirements from arithmetic to advanced mathematics
DOT STS scale 0-10 measuring adaptability to work requiring set limits, tolerances, or standards
DOT FINGDEX scale 0-10 measuring finger dexterity requirements
DOT EYEHAND scale 0-10 measuring eye-hand-foot coordination requirements
Percentage points of employment accounted for by college graduates in occupations
Log points of relative demand for college-educated labor
